long_description:
[MON] Sysdig agent pod is Ready but missing all metrics is Triggered

TIP Situation: Sysdig agent pod is Ready but missing all metrics
TIP Short Description: The Sysdig agent pod is Ready on node lon2-qz1-sr2-rk018-s02 in mzone797 but it is not exposing any metrics
TIP Console: toc
TIP Self Healing: true
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds: 4200
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:eu-gb::mzone797:pod:sysdig-agent-compute-mx6lq
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
